name: Black Bean & Root Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium Turnip, cut into rounds and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bottom of a large casserole dish, arrange the turnip slices and sprinkle with nutmeg.
2. Layer the remaining vegetables in order, sprinkling herbs after each layer.
3. Top with the soaked beans.
4. Pour over enough water or stock to cover and season with salt and pepper.
5. Cover with a good tight-fitting lid.
6. Place in an oven pre-heated to 300°F.
7. Cook for 3 hours. If desired, add dumplings and cook for a further 30 minutes.
